data.description:
# Add execution-phase plan reviews

## Goal
Allow plan changes made during implementation to be reviewed without re-litigating low-priority implementation findings, while retaining the stricter planning review when one already exists.

## Implementation
- Derive planning versus execution mode from ticket lifecycle: entering in_progress begins execution mode, which persists until a transition back to open resets planning mode.
- Add signed review-phase metadata. Planning reviews record planning; execution reviews record execution plus priority-floor 0.80. Treat phase-less legacy attestations as planning.
- In planning mode accept only planning attestations. In execution mode accept a planning attestation or an execution attestation carrying a compatible floor.
- For an execution review, use effective blocking threshold max(normal criterion threshold, 0.8). Advisory-only criteria remain advisory; deterministic structural failures remain blocking; sub-threshold findings stay visible.
- Snapshot lifecycle phase and material before review, then recheck both immediately before signing so concurrent transitions or edits cannot certify the wrong mode.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Lifecycle histories deterministically derive execution mode until and only until return to open, including transitions from in_progress through other statuses.
- [ ] Signed phase/floor metadata and legacy phase-less compatibility follow the planning/execution acceptance rules.
- [ ] Execution reviews apply the 0.8 blocking floor without suppressing visible findings, weakening structural failures, or promoting advisory-only criteria.

## Verification
- Run focused lifecycle, manifest, threshold, and sign-time concurrency tests.
- Run make check and the non-integration test suite.
data.title: Add planning and execution phases to plan-review attestations
